observations.description: SSE presence.subscribe ERR_INCOMPLETE_CHUNKED_ENCODING errors in browser console (7 occurrences). These are Chrome network-level errors for SSE disconnects, not JS application errors. App reconnects gracefully — no user-facing impact.

checks: Phase 3: Cluster Detail — Overview, Nodes, Pods, Deployments, Services, Namespaces, Events, Logs, Metrics, Autoscaling (light + dark) ✅
Phase 12: Cross-Cutting (console errors, dark/light, command palette, navigation) ✅

v220_fixes_verified.sse_disconnect_handling: SSE reconnects gracefully, no user-facing errors. Browser-level network errors still appear in console (expected Chrome behavior).
